'''Garhai''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of armor-plated [[Fish/Legends|fish]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Neimoidia/Legends|Neimoidia]]. The planet's native [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidians]] saw the garhai as a symbol of obedience and "dedication to enlightened leadership." Along with its twin symbol, the [[Spherical Flame]], this was considered one of the two most powerful symbols in Neimoidian culture and as such they were often displayed on the walls of Neimoidian buildings. This included the grotto on Neimoidia where in [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]] [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation Viceroy]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]] first introduced his advisors, legal counsel [[Rune Haako/Legends|Rune Haako]] and [[Deputy Viceroy]] [[Hath Monchar]] to the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]]. Gunray would later compare the fish to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems's]] [[manta droid subfighter]]s.
